title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Razorpay - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Razorpay - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Razorpay in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Razorpay:
Razorpay is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay!
